title: Mamit-ah Poshan Panchayat Meet & Sanitation Day hman a ni
content:
140/2026-2027

Dated:Mamit the 13th of April, 2026:Vawiin khan 8th Poshan Pakhwada 2026 pualin Women & Child Development Mamit District chuan Poshan Panchayat Meet & Sanitation Day Siamliana Hall-ah an hmang.

Vawiin hian Mamit khawchhunga Poshan Panchayat Committee member te nen hun hman a ni a. Pu Lalruatmawi Ralte,District Programme Officer, Women & Child Development, Mamit chuan Poshan Panchayat Committee mawhphurhna te eitur tha pawimawhna leh screen time reduction( Screen en tlem) chungchang te a tarlang.

He hun hi Pi H Lalrinchhani, District Coordinator, Poshan Abhyan chuan kaihruaiin hun hman zawh hian committee te hian Anganwadi Centre theuh tifaiin hun an hmang nghal bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Excise & Narcotics, Commissioner-in Mamit Excise Office tlawh
content:
139/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 13th of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha, Commissioner, Excise & Narcotics leh Inspecting staff te chuan Mamit Excise & Narcotics Office tlawhin, Annual Inspection hun a hmanpui.

Commissioner chuan Excise & Narcotics Enforcement Staff te endikin, mahni hna ṭheuhah tui taka thawk tur leh ruihhlo laka inveng chung zelin khawtlang leh ram tana thawk turin a fuih a, Department ti hmingchhe zawnga awmlo tur leh hna thawk ṭha duh lo tan chuan voluntary a ban dil mai a that zawk thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha chuan inspection a neihpui zawhin END, Mamit-a thawktute zawhna hrang hrangte chhangin hun hlawkthlak tak hman ho a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah Green-Ag 11th Technical Support Group (TSG) ṭhut khawm buatsaih a ni
content:
138/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 13:Vawiin khan Green-Ag Project Mizoram hnuaia Green Landscape Implementation Unit (GLIU) Lunglei Technical Support Group (TSG) chu an Chairman, Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann hovin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah a ṭum 11 nan an ṭhu khawm a. Agriculture line department aṭangin mi thiamte kal khawmin, Green-Ag Project hma lak tawhna leh kum 2026–2027 atana ruahmannate an thlir ho.

Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Green-Ag project chu lo neitute'n ram tichereu tam lo zawnga eizawnna ngelnghet an neih theih nana ṭangkai tak a nih thu sawiin, a hlawhtlin ngei a beisei thu leh Mizoram hmun dang tan pawha entawn tlaka hma lak chhunzawm zel a nih a beisei thu a sawi.

State Technical Coordinator Dr Kenny  Vanlalhriatpuia'n project report tawi a pe a. Mizoram chu India rama Green-Ag project hma lakna kalpui ṭha berte zinga mi a ni tih tar langin, Green Landsacape Implementation Unit (GLIU) ṭobul leh a thil tum hrang hrangte a sawi fiah bawk.

Green-Ag GLIU Team Leader-in-charge Dr Vanlalchhandama chuan kum hmasaa hma lakna hrang hrang dinhmun a tar lang a. Kum 2026–2027 atana project hmachhawp (Annual Work Plan & Budget) leh hma lak hmanhmawh ṭul bikte chu committee hmaah pharhin, Chairman kaihhruaiin sawi ho zui a ni.

He hunah hian Lunglei District-a hmachhawp langsar zual – Sustainable Agriculture hnuaia vaimim, hmarcha, bekang leh thlasik thlai chin dan tur te; project hnuaia vawk leh ar vulhtute tana zirtirna pek dan tur te; thing phun leh kangmei chhuak tur venna kawnga hma lakna tur te leh protected area chhehvela ramngaw leh nungcha humhalh dan tur chungchang te sawi ho a ni.

He ṭhut khawmah hian Green Landscape Management Plan (GLMP) hma lakna hrang hrangte thlir ho niin, Lunglei District-a line department hrang hrang nena thawh ho dan tur (convergence) chungchang sawi ho a ni bawk a. Kum 2026–2027 Annual Work Plan leh Budget atana ruahman cheng nuai 133.37 (₹1,33,37,665/-) chu pawm a ni bawk.

Green-Ag Project hnuaiah hian Lunglei leh Mamit District-ah hectare 8,972.1 vela zauvah leh khaw 38-ah hma lak mek a ni a. Lunglei District-ah hian Bunghmun RD block-a khaw 13-ah he project hi kalpui a ni a. April ni 10 khan Mamit District Annual Work Plan & Budget cheng nuai 152.86 (₹1,52,86,305/-) chu pawm a lo ni tawh bawk.

Green-Ag Project hi Food and Agriculture Organisation (FAO) leh Global Environment Facility (GEF) fund hnuaia kalpui niin, a tum ber chu India rama lo neitute'n ngelnghet zawk leh ramngaw tichereu lo zawnga eizawnna tlo leh hmasawnna an neih theih nana hma lak a ni.

title: SAWRKARIN  DRY DAY PUANG
content:
137/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13th April, 2026 :General Election to the Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026 neih tur inpuahchahna kalpui mek zelah Commissioner of Excise & Narcotics, Excise & Narcotics Department, Mizoram chuan Section 4A of the Mizoram Liquor (Prohibition) Amendment Act, 2025 in thuneihna a pek tlawhchhanin April ni 20, 2026 (Thawhtanni) tlai dar 4:00 atanga vote thlak ni April ni 21, 2026 (Thawhlehni) tlai dar 4:00 thleng (darkar 24 chhung) bakah,vote thlak that a tul chuan April ni 23, 2026 telin,leh Vote chhiar hun tura ruat April ni 27, 2026 (Thawhtanni) a vote chhiar zawh fel a nih hma chu Aizawl Municipal Corporation huam chhungah zu khap burna ni 'Dry Day' puan a nih thu a puang.

title: Government of Mizoram declares Dry Days ahead of AMC Election 2026
content:
19/2026-2027

13th April, 2026 :In exercise of the power conferred by Section 4A of the Mizoram Liquor (Prohibition) Amendment Act, 2025, Caommissioner of Excise & Narcotics, Government of Mizoram has declared Dry Days for the whole area ofAizawl Municipal Corporationw.e.f.4:00 PM of 20.04.2026 to 4:00 PM of 21.04.2026 (i.e. 24 hours, immediately preceding the hours fixed for conclusion of Poll Day)and shall includes re-poll day (23rdApril, 2026), if necessary and on27.04.2026(thedateonwhichCountingofvotesistobetakenup)on account ofGeneralElectionto the Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026during which sale and consumption of any intoxicating liquor or wine shall be prohibited· in the said areas.

title: Lunglei SP-in ATL Road kawng siam mek avangin lirthei tlan dan tur ruahmanna thar a siam
content:
136/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 13:April ni 11, 2026 (Inrinni) khan Lunglei District Superintendent of Police ai awhin Addl SP Pi Sarah Lalrinkimi chuan The Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 Section 115/117 leh Government of Mizoram Notification No.B.12012/10/2004-TRP Dt.1.6.2020 tlawh chhanin a hnuaia mi ang hian lirthei tlan dan tur ruahmanna thar siamin, hriattirna a chhuah.

1. ATL road siam mekah Tlawng Bridge – Pukpui inkar kawng hi Heavy Motor Vehicle (HMV) leh Medium Motor Vehicle (MMV) tan Dt. 11.05.2026 (Monday) thleng khar (complete road blockage) a ni.

He thupek hian 11th April 2026 – 11th May 2026 thleng a huam ang.

2. Light Motor Vehicle (LMV) tan bik a hnuaia mi ang hian kawng hawn hun leh khar hun (complete road blockage) siam a ni.

Kawng khar hun:

(1) 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM(2) 2:30 PM to 6:00 PM

Kawng hawn hun:(1) 1:00 PM to 2:30 PM(2) 6:00 PM to 9:00bAM

3. Dt. 12th May 2026 aṭangin Heavy Motor Vehicle (HMV), Medium Motor Vehicle (MMV) leh Light Motor Vehicle (LMV) zawng zawng tan notification hmasa No.PCL-27A/2019/348 Dated Lunglei, the 19th Feb, 2026 angin a hnuaia mi ang hian kawng hawn hun leh khar hun (complete road blockage) siam a ni.

Kawng khar hun(1) 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM(2) 2:30 PM to 6:00 PM

Kawng hawn hun(1) 1:00 PM to 2:30 PM(2) 6:00 PM to 9:00 AM

He thupek hian 31st May 2026 thleng a huam ang.

Hei hian dan leh thupek kengkawhtu Police duty, Magistrate duty, Fire & Emergency Service, Excise & Narcotics Department duty, Medical duty, Disaster Response Force, Power & Electricity Department duty, Public Health Engineering Department duty, school-a thawkte leh a bika Superintendent of Police, Lungleiin phalna a pekte chu a huam lo vang.

Kawng khar hun chhunga emergency thil avanga kal tlang mamawhte chuan he'ng a hnuaia phone no. dahahte hian biak tur a ni ang.

1. Sub-Divisional Police Officer, Lunglei – 82599019712. Officer-In-Charge, Lunglei – 8729829989

Attachment

title: Mizoram Public Service Commission huaihawt Circle Officer Under Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department Examination, 2026 neih tur chungchanga District Level Observer thuchhuah
content:
135/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 13th April 2026:Mizoram Public Service Commission huaihawt Circle Officer Under Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department Examination, 2026 neih tur chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Distrcit Bawrhsap leh District Level Observer nibawk chuan thuchhuah a siam.

PUBLIC NOTICE

Mizoram Public Service Commission huaihawt Circle Officer Under Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department Examination, 2026 on 14th April, 2026 chu Govt. Lawngtlai College ah neih tur a ni.Candidate zawng zawngte Exam ni hian Zing Dar 08:30 AM ah Exam na hmun thlen theuh tawh tur a ni a, Admit Card ken theuh bawk tur a ni. Candidates zawng zawngte Frisking tih a ngaih avangin thlen hun tur dar bi tukah thlen kim vek tur a ni.

Candidate zawng zawngte thawmhnaw mumal tak inbel tur a ni a, Kekawrbul, Slipper, etc. inbel loh tur a ni. Tin, Exam Centre ah Ran hruai loh tur a ni.

Exam Hall ah hian Electronic Gadget eng chi mah (Moblie Phone, Digital watch, Smart Watch, lighter, etc.) ken luh phal a ni lo. Hei bakah hian thil bo hlauhthawnawm leh kan mamawh loh thil ken loh hram nise. Keng lui kan awm a, a lo bo palh a nih chuan Exam Centre a officials leh duty ten mawh kan phur loving.

Lirthei keng turte tan Gate pawn ah lirthei dah vek tur a ni ang.

DONNY LALRUATSANGADeputy Commissioner&District Level Observer,Lawngtlai District , Lawngtlai

Attachment

title: Lawngtlai District chhunga Lo/Huan hal chungchanga Bawrhsap thuchhuah
content:
134/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 13th April 2026:Lo (ram) hal hun a pelh tawh avangin a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chuan thuchhuah a siam.

ORDER

No.J.11013/2/2026-DC (LTI) : Order hmasa kan lo tihchhuah tawh ang khan, Lo (ram) hal hun pelh tawh avangin Lawngtlai District chhungah Lo/Huan an hal tawh tur a ni lo. District Level Committee on Fire Prevention meeting Dt.09.01.2026 in a rel angin, kangmei lakah mihring, bungrua, ramngaw leh nungcha te kan him zawk nan khapna thupek hi chhuah tul ni a hriat a ni.

Chuvangin kei DONNY LALRUATSANGA, MCS DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT, LAWNGTLAI chuan Section.163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksh Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 thuneihna min pek angina a hnuaia thupek hi ka chhuah e.

1. Village Council tin ten mahni vengchhunga kangmei tichhuaktu a zawng chhuak tur a ni.

2. Mi tumahin lo/huan leh leipui an hal tawh tur a ni lo.

3. Mi tumahin ramhnuaia an meichhem ti mit lovin an kalsan tur a ni lo.

He thupeh zawm lo chu Section.223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

He thupek hian Lawngtlai District pum a huam anga, thu leh awm hma chu tih chhuah nih atanga thlahnih (2) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiin Date.13.04.2026 hian District Magistrate Seal a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

DONNY LALRUATSANGADistrict Magistrate,Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai.

Attachment

title: GENERAL ELECTION TO AIZAWL MUNICIPAL CORPORATION (AMC), 2026 POLLING PERSONNEL TE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
133/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13th April, 2026: Vawiin khan kan hma lawka General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC), 2026 a polling personnel: Presiding Officers(PRO) leh Polling Parties te tan District Election Officer’s (DEO) &District Municipal Election Officer’s (DMEO) office, Aizawl District chuan Training a buatsaih.

Vawiin Training-ah hian Presiding Officers te chu Master Trainer: Pi Lalruatpuii Hnamte, MCS; Pi Esther Leihang, MCS; Pi Christina Lalmuanzuali, MSC; Pi F. Lanisai, MCS; Dr. Lalchamliani, MCS, Malsawmhriatzuali, MCS; Pu Ngurthansanga, MCS ten Poll Process & Election Forms, EVM (Theory & Hands-on) an zirtir a.

Polling parties te hi Master Trainer : Pu Obed Lalmalsawma, MCS; Pu Samuel Malsawmzuala, MCS; Pu Hmingmawizuala, MCS Pu Lalawmpuia, MCS; Pi Lalhriatpuii Phutin, MCS; Pu PC Lalrammuanpuia, MCS; Pu Lalrindika, MCS; Pu Lalthakima chhangte, MCS leh Pu VL Chaka Hmar, MCS ten an  zirtir ve thung.

Vawiin training hi Polling station 264 a duty tur,( reserve te nen) Presiding Officers, Polling Officers- I &II ten an chhim a ni.

title: AMC,2026 INTHLANPUIA “HOME VOTING” KALPUI TAN
content:
132/2026-2027

AIZAWL; the 13thApril,2026:Tukin zing dar 7:00Am atang khan General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation(AMC), 2026 atana kum upa te, damlo natna khirh bik nei polling station pan theilo te leh pianphung a rualbanlo polling station pan theilo te tana a vote thlak theihna tura ruahman,Home Votingchu  kalpui tan a ni a. Home Voting hi  ni 13.4.2026 (Monday) atanga ni 16.4.2026 (Thursday) thleng  kalpui tura ruahman a ni.

Home Voting ni hmasa ber atan tukin zing dar 6:00 khan District Election Officer’s Office, Aizawl atang in vote thlakna tur EVMs leh Materials te Municipal Ward tin te Municipal Returning Officers (MROs) ten General Observer hriatpuina in an Strong Room atangin an pechhuak a ni.

Home Voting hi AMC Ward 19-ah kalpui vek tur a ni a, Ward tinah Home Voting Team pakhat theuh awm in, Home Voting ti tura dilna lut zat hi 2769 a ni a, ni 4 chhung a vote thlak hi zawh hman tura ruahman a ni, Municipal Ward – 2 ah dilna hi lut tamber in diltu mi 209 an awm a ni.

Tukin a Home Voting Team tirhchhuahnaah hian General Observers te, DEO aiawh Election Officers & staffs te, Ward tin MROs leh AMROs te, Home Voting Nodal Officer te, EVMs Nodal Officer te, Information & Publicity Nodal Officer te leh Political Party aiawh te an tel a ni.

Hriat theih chinah vawiin Home Voting a, Vote thlak upa ber chu Pi Nghakliani, Kum 102, Dawrpui veng, Ward-IX hnuai a  mi a ni.
